name: Silver Thread Stirred Eggs
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Cooked ham, cut into matchstick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover bean threads with warm water and let stand for 30 minutes. Drain, then place on a cutting board and cut into 4-inch lengths.
2. Cover mushrooms with 3/4 cup warm water and let stand for 30 minutes. Remove mushrooms from water, pour off 1/2 cup of water into a bowl, discard mushroom stems, squeeze mushrooms dry, and slice thinly.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs with salt and pepper.
4. Heat a wok or wide frying pan over high heat. When the pan is hot, add oil.
5. When the oil begins to heat, add garlic. Stir once, then add ham and mushrooms and stir fry for one minute.
6. Add celery and bamboo shoots and stir fry for 2 minutes.
7. Add bean threads and mushroom water and cook until liquid is absorbed.
8. Add green onion and cook for 30 seconds.
9. Reduce heat to medium. Pour eggs into the pan, turning occasionally with a wide spatula, until the eggs are soft and creamy.
